## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Change type

- [ ] Editorial — clarification, typo, formatting (no interoperability impact)
- [ ] Additive — new field, feature, or relaxation (backward-compatible)
- [ ] Breaking — changes validation, semantics, or archive layout (requires major version bump)

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to an issue (normative changes require a 7-day discussion period)
- [ ] `spec.md` updated (if normative change)
- [ ] Examples updated and validated (`bun run test:conformance` in `schema/`)
- [ ] JSON schemas regenerated (`bun run generate` in `schema/`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s` for DCO)

## Compatibility impact

<!-- How does this affect existing AFPS producers, consumers, and registries? -->
